response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong hands-on engineer with nearly two decades of broad experience and an authentic open-source track record (founder of an open-source GIS platform, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker), which aligns well with the company's open-source and Linux focus. However, this is an executive-level leadership role, and the resume shows no formal team leadership, project management, or client advisory experience. Most critically, the role requires minimum C1 German for client-facing consulting work in Germany, while his German is listed as Basic — a hard disqualifier. There is also no evidence of UML, requirements management, or IT security/compliance expertise.
strengths: Extensive and versatile engineering experience (~18 years) spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Genuine open-source commitment: founded and maintains an open-source geo-data platform, multiple published libraries, conference talks
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing inclination through workshops, courses, and code katas, plus solid Linux/DevOps background
concerns: German listed as Basic; the role requires minimum C1 for advising German clients
No formal team leadership, technical project management, or executive experience for a Head of Development role
No demonstrated UML, requirements management, or IT security/risk/compliance background; Python absent from skill set

key_factors.factor: Leadership and project management track record
